catalysts_general: ~39% of float sold short, stock surged 41% on Novo Nordisk GLP-1 partnership resolving patent lawsuit. But SEC investigation into compounding practices, DOJ inquiry, and FDA regulatory overhang create triple-threat risk (Tier 1 — SEC filings; Tier 4 — news)

Discovery: Was down 75-80% from $70 peak before Novo Nordisk partnership catalyzed 46% single-day surge to ~$22; short interest at record 35-43% of float creates massive squeeze potential; Barclays raised target to $29, management guiding $2.7-2.9B 2026 revenue; GLP-1 legal overhang removed by Novo deal — but execution risk on scaling FDA-approved Wegovy/Ozempic distribution is real, and the stock has already bounced significantly.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Novo Nordisk GLP-1 deal is real positive, but SEC/DOJ/FDA triple investigation threat makes risk/reward unattractive

catalysts_general: 4-insider cluster buy totaling $1.2M (CEO Faitelson $599K first buy in 12 months) at $22-24 after 60% crash; but active securities class-action lawsuit filed — litigation risk unresolved (Tier 1 — SEC Form 4; Tier 5 — lawsuit filings)

Discovery: Down 60% from Oct 2025 peak on SaaS transition pain and class-action lawsuits; 4-insider cluster buy in Feb 2026 ($1.2M total, CEO's first buy in 12 months) at $22-24 signals management confidence that the SaaS transition inflection is near — next earnings in ~60 days is the prove-it catalyst, but lawsuits add risk.
growth_picks.analyst_take: 4-insider cluster buy $1.2M is positive, but active securities class action lawsuit creates binary legal risk
